Localization.Description: An attacker can launch masqueraded control.exe file in the current working directory using WorkFolders in order to bypass security measures

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Control.exe process was detected running using WorkFolders in a suspicious directory by user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Control.exe process was detected running with original name {object.process.original_name} using WorkFolders in a suspicious directory by user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
